title: Stock alerts
description: Active products for the selected branch. Set “Minimum stock” under Inventory → Products: leave it empty for red alerts only at zero stock; set a value for amber alerts when stock is at or below that minimum (including zero).
description_lotes: Batches expiring within the next {{dias}} days or already expired with remaining stock at the branch.
search_placeholder_lotes: Search by product, SKU, or batch number…

sin_sedes.title: No active branches
sin_sedes.description: Create an active branch to review stock and alerts.

empty.no_records_description: No products are in alert for this branch. Set a minimum stock on the product or check again when quantity hits zero.
empty.no_records_lotes_description: No batches expiring within {{dias}} days or expired with stock at this branch.
empty.no_results_description: Try different filters or search terms.
